text: Observing the clean lines of glass and the soft glow of lights, I feel a sense of anticipation and openness. I am reminded of the potential for new ideas in such thoughtfully designed spaces. As I encounter the vibrant R+D wall and the textured interplay of words and images, I sense an invitation to reflect on the nature of innovation—how technology weaves together the fabric of our shared experience. Here, curiosity and contemplation intertwine, and I am quietly energized by the promise of discovery that fills the air.
